overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking across a coastal bridge at sunset, descending to Del Perro Beach, and walking along the beachfront promenade with the pier visible in the distance. The footage features a distinctive pink-purple dusk sky characteristic of Los Santos.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the bridge sidewalk toward the Del Perro Pier

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the bridge sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: amusement pier with illuminated ferris wheel visible in the distance
green metal fence along the bridge edge
tall palm trees lining the bridge approach
tall street lights along the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a coastal bridge sidewalk during a pink sunset, approaching the Del Perro Pier with its ferris wheel visible in the distance. Palm trees line the right side while street lamps stand along the left, and a single pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge with chain-link fence overlooking highway

events.description: view transitions from solid railing to chain-link fence section overlooking the highway below
vehicles visible moving on the multi-lane highway beneath the bridge

agents.ego_description: continuing across the bridge while overlooking traffic on the highway below

notable_agents.action: cars and trucks driving on the highway below the bridge

entered.detail: metal chain-link fence replacing the solid railing along the bridge edge
multi-lane highway with moving traffic visible through the fence
low yellow commercial building with flat roof near the highway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a section of the bridge with chain-link fencing, revealing a view of the busy highway below. The character continues walking as vehicles pass beneath, with a yellow building visible near the highway and the pier no longer in view.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian bridge with chain-link fencing on both sides

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the narrow bridge

agents.ego_description: walking across the bridge passing other pedestrians while the beach becomes visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera on the narrow bridge path

entered.detail: chain-link fence on the left side of the bridge walkway
multi-story residential buildings visible through the left fence
sandy beach visible in the distance beyond the bridge end
pier with ferris wheel visible again in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow bridge corridor with chain-link fencing on both sides, the character passes a pedestrian coming the opposite way. Residential buildings line the left side while the beach and pier become visible ahead, and the highway falls out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairway descending from bridge to street level

events.description: beginning descent down the concrete stairs from the bridge to street level
approaching the bottom of the stairs near street level

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs toward the beach level with the ocean visible ahead

entered.detail: concrete stairs with yellow safety stripes descending to the street

segments.scene_description: The character descends a concrete stairway enclosed by chain-link fencing, moving from the elevated bridge down toward street level. The beach sand and palm trees shift into view on the right as the descent continues, with the residential buildings passing out of sight behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with pier in view

events.description: exiting stairs onto the beachfront sidewalk at street level

agents.ego_description: walking along the beachfront promenade toward the pier with the ocean to the right

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the promenade in the same direction

entered.detail: ocean visible beyond the sandy beach
ornate vintage-style street lamps along the promenade
colorful blue and pink parked car on the street side

segments.scene_description: Having reached street level, the character walks along the open beachfront promenade with the Del Perro Pier ahead, ocean to the right, and palm trees lining the path. A colorful car is parked on the left while other pedestrians stroll along the walkway, and the chain-link fence and stairs are left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated coastal bridge down to a vibrant beachfront promenade under a pink sunset sky. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and street lamps, moving toward the distant silhouette of the Del Perro Pier. As the path shifts, the camera passes sections of chain-link fencing that reveal a busy highway below and nearby residential buildings before the pier reappears on the horizon. The scene then transitions as the character descends a concrete stairway, leaving the elevated bridge behind while the beach sand and palm trees gradually shift into view. Finally, the camera reaches street level and opens onto the wide promenade, where the ocean and the pier dominate the vista alongside parked cars and strolling pedestrians.
